questions: What optimizations drive better digital campaign outcomes per Nielsen?
Where do campaigns commonly leave ROI on the table?
qa.answer: Underserved reach/frequency, poor creative quality, and weak measurement lead to missed outcomes. Optimizing audience quality, creative fit, and on‑target reach improves ROI.
implication: Audit on‑target reach and frequency distribution; correct oversaturation.
Improve creative quality and format fit; iterate with brand and sales lift.
Strengthen measurement and calibrate with incrementality.
